## IWorkspaceCreateParams.userFileSources property

File tree sources for user-specific data (journals, future inventory). Separate from shared library sources.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly userFileSources?: ILibraryFileTreeSource | ReadonlyArray<ILibraryFileTreeSource>;
```
